fields.summary: Add cgroups support for docker containers

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

issuetype.description: A problem which impairs or prevents the functions of the product.
issuetype.name: Bug

fields.description: Currently, cgroups-based resource isolation does not work with docker containers under YARN. The processes in these containers are launched by the docker daemon and they are not children of a container-executor process. Docker supports a --cgroup-parent flag which can be used to point to the container-specific cgroups that are created by the nodemanager. This will allow the Nodemanager to manage cgroups (as it does today) while allowing resource isolation to work with docker containers.

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed

fields.summary: DockerLinuxContainer can't limit the cpu usage

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

issuetype.description: A problem which impairs or prevents the functions of the product.
issuetype.name: Bug
